content: I can tell you what Tom thinks.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Io riesco a dirle cosa pensa Tom
ita:Io riesco a dirti cosa pensa Tom

ind:Aku bisa memberitahukanmu yang Tom pikirkan
